text.title: Task Creation Checklist and Quality Gate
text.summary: Phase-by-phase checklist for creating a TASK_NNN.md file and the quality gate for executor-readiness.

list.item: Estimate token budget: SDD docs + dependency tree + research + implementation + testing — must total < 100k
If estimate > 100k: split the task before writing the file
Create SDD References table linking constitution, spec (relevant FR-X), design (relevant AD-X), contracts
Identify all completed tasks this one depends on
For each dependency: read done/TASK_NNN.md Summary section
Extract: summary, files, patterns, at least one key code snippet
Build visual dependency tree in task file
Link to each dependency TASK file with "Read Summary section"
Inline full FR-X text for each requirement this task implements
Inline full AD-X text for each decision this task applies
Write Out of Scope section BEFORE Goals
Write 3 specific measurable Goals
Write AC in Given/When/Then format — each AC marked with FR-X it covers
List CREATE/MODIFY files — maximum 8; split task if more
Write Risks and Mitigations: concrete actions not vague hedges
Write Potential Blockers as actual exit conditions
Write Testing section with specific test file paths or function names
Token estimate < 100k (verify with estimate-tokens.py)
SDD References complete and linked (not just by ID)
Dependency tree documents prior work with code snippets
Requirements coverage shows FR/AD full text (not reference only)
AC in Given/When/Then format with FR-X traces
Out of Scope defined before Goals
Files to Change: 8 or fewer
Risks have concrete mitigations
Task has a single, focused objective (INVEST: Independent, Small)
SUMMARY comment in header is one sentence, machine-parseable
